final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner news/feature image for a Weibo hot-topic post.

Style/medium: must be professional documentary photography style — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong street photography, Alex Webb color-layered compositions, contemporary Chinese urban documentary photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be horizontal wide format with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include an urban skyline at dusk, neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in motion, distant high-rise buildings reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include a cityscape at dusk with dramatic light-shadow contrast and authentic on-site atmosphere
Lighting/mood: must be dramatic chiaroscuro with golden-hour sunset light and emerging neon illumination
Color palette: must blend warm sunset tones with cool neon accents
Materials/textures: must include sharp details with high-resolution 8K-quality texture
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold or modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must be strictly 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal orientation, professional editorial quality, real on-site documentary feel
Avoid:
